parameters.url: =https://api.rentcast.io/v1/avm/value?address={{ encodeURIComponent($('Normalize Intake').item.json.intake.address) }}&city={{ encodeURIComponent($('Normalize Intake').item.json.intake.city) }}&state={{ encodeURIComponent($('Normalize Intake').item.json.intake.state) }}&zipCode={{ $('Normalize Intake').item.json.intake.zip }}

={{ 'https://api.weather.gov/points/' + (($('Property Lookup').item.json[0] && $('Property Lookup').item.json[0].latitude) ? $('Property Lookup').item.json[0].latitude : '33.8303') + ',' + (($('Property Lookup').item.json[0] && $('Property Lookup').item.json[0].longitude) ? $('Property Lookup').item.json[0].longitude : '-116.5453') }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-5', max_tokens: 1800, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [ 'You are a luxury real estate analyst. Use ONLY the verified data below.', 'RULES: Never invent facts. Do NOT state the property is for sale unless listing data confirms it.', 'wouldWeBuyItReason: 2-3 sentences citing score, comps, flood risk, income. 50-70 words.', 'Return ONLY valid JSON: executiveSummary, sellerAngle, buyerAngle, investmentAngle, dataQualityNote, wouldWeBuyIt (Yes/Maybe/Needs Review), wouldWeBuyItReason. Max 80 words each.', 'PROPERTY: ' + JSON.stringify($json.normalized.subject), 'VITALS: ' + JSON.stringify($json.normalized.property), 'VALUATION: ' + JSON.stringify($json.normalized.valuation), 'COMPS: ' + JSON.stringify(($json.normalized.comps || []).slice(0,3)), 'FLOOD: ' + JSON.stringify($json.normalized.flood), 'DEMOGRAPHICS: ' + JSON.stringify($json.normalized.demographics), 'SCORE: ' + $json.score + ' RATING: ' + $json.rating ].join(' ') }] }) }}

parameters.name: summary
parameters.value: ={{ ($('OpenAI Narrative').item.json.content && $('OpenAI Narrative').item.json.content[0]) ? String($('OpenAI Narrative').item.json.content[0].text || '').substring(0, 400) : 'Your PropertyDNA report is ready.' }}

parameters.body: ={"recipientEmail":"stuartteamps@gmail.com","recipientName":"Daniel (Internal Copy)","propertyAddress":"=$('Normalize Intake').item.json.intake.address + ', ' + $('Normalize Intake').item.json.intake.city + ', ' + $('Normalize Intake').item.json.intake.state","summary":"No lead email provided — internal copy.","viewToken":"=($('Save to Supabase').item.json.viewToken || '')","reportId":"=($('Save to Supabase').item.json.reportId || '')","ownerCopy":false}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: "success", message: "Property DNA report processed and sent.", reportUrl: $("Save to Supabase").item.json.reportUrl }) }}
